text:
Market today: Optimism is returning to the chip sector, driven by Micron's strong performance. This is a key positive for your heavily concentrated tech/chip book.

Your holdings: SOXL (-23.52%) and SPAL (-11.17%) are both leveraged ETFs showing significant drawdowns and are flagged "SELL" or "NEW". Remember, margin amplifies these drops.

Watch: Keep an eye on other chip names for follow-through from Micron's gains. Also, continue to monitor the volatility and decay in your leveraged positions.

Bottom line: Manage risk aggressively in your leveraged holdings while looking for sustained strength in the broader chip sector.
plays: Respect the SOXL stop at 200; its "SELL" status and leveraged nature demand attention.
Monitor SPAL closely, especially its stop at 21.38, given it's new and leveraged.
Consider LRCX for a new long at 349.85-349.23, stop 347.77, aligning with chip sector optimism.
